subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! Praise be to God, thou hast been and art beneath the glances of His loving-kindness. Thou didst turn unto Him in days when the people of the world were turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم لله الحمد تحت لحاظ عنایت بوده و هستی در ایامی اقبال نمودی که اهل عالم معرض
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
